name: Architecture Decision Record
description: Produce a well-reasoned ADR: context, options, decision, and consequences.

tasks.name: context
options
tasks.prompt: Enumerate the candidate options that address the context. For each option give its pros, cons, and risks.

tasks.name: decision
tasks.prompt: Select the best option and justify the decision against the forces and constraints from the context.

tasks.name: consequences
tasks.prompt: Write the final ADR in the standard format (Title, Status: Proposed, Context, Decision, Consequences), incorporating the positive and negative consequences of the chosen option.
